'''''The Official Star Wars Fact File'' 98''' was the ninety-eighth issue of ''[[The Official Star Wars Fact File]]'', released on [[November 12]], [[2003]].

{{Magazine-stub|issue}}

*[[Battle of Calamari]]
*[[Dianoga/Legends|Dianoga]]

*[[Geonosis/Legends|Geonosis]] - [[Geonosian War Room/Legends|War Room]]
*[[Scarab Mark VI assassin droid|Scarab droid]]
*[[:Category:Clothing|Garments and couture]]
*[[Naga Sadow/Legends|Naga Sadow's]] [[Sith Meditation Sphere|Meditation Sphere ship]]
